# Symbv Flask Project Instructions

1. Install dependencies: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
2. Run the app: `python app.py`
3. Deploy to Render, Vercel, or any public cloud platform
4. Make at least 3 git commits
5. Record a 2-minute demo video
6. Submit GitHub repo link and live deployment URL

# Deployment
Add your deployment steps in `.github/workflow.yml` or follow platform-specific instructions.

# Customization
Add more features, pages, or logic as needed. Ensure error handling and clean code.

# Documentation
Update README.md and this file as you progress.
